title: Panel
text: Panel A Panel is a Development Object that defines a toolbar containing buttons to execute structure editor functions and operations on the active form. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: pnl Main Development Object? No Part of: Untyped Library Contains: Property , Code Container Generalization: Development Object Specializations: — Compilation output: PanelName @ Library .pnl URI format: lib: LibraryName :pnl: PanelName Specialization Panel specializes Development Object in the following ways: It has a runtime library as parent object. It has no child development objects. Properties Description Function Character Attributes View Font Range Height Width Operation Glyph Name & Message Text Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
